summary: Phase 4 Cross-Document Intelligence testing completed. All 24 backend tests passed. Name mismatch detection working correctly - title normalization removes 'MR' making document names match exactly (severity: none). Frontend correctly hides warning when has_mismatches=false.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Name mismatch warning correctly hidden when has_mismatches=false)

seed_data_creation: Used existing employee (d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 - Olakunle Alonge) with 2 document extractions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Cross-Document Intelligence fully tested. Key features verified: (1) GET /api/employees/{id}/name-mismatches returns analysis with severity, variants, comparisons, (2) GET /api/compliance/name-mismatches returns all employees with mismatches sorted by severity, (3) POST /api/employees/{id}/name-mismatches/review supports dismiss, flag_for_investigation, resolved actions, (4) Name comparison correctly removes titles (mr, mrs, dr, etc) before comparison, (5) Jaccard similarity calculation works correctly, (6) Severity levels (none, low, medium, high, critical) assigned correctly, (7) Frontend displays name mismatch warning only when has_mismatches=true (data-testid='name-mismatch-warning'), (8) View Details button expands to show name variants and comparisons (data-testid='view-name-mismatch-btn'). Test employee 'Olakunle Alonge' has 2 document extractions with names 'ALONGE OLAKUNLE MOSES' (RTW) and 'ALONGE MR OLAKUNLE MOSES' (ID) which match exactly after title normalization.

name_mismatch_analysis_endpoint.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/name-mismatches returns correct structure with severity, name_variants, comparisons, recommendations

compliance_name_mismatches_endpoint.details: GET /api/compliance/name-mismatches returns employees sorted by severity with severity_counts

name_mismatch_review_endpoint.details: POST /api/employees/{id}/name-mismatches/review accepts dismiss, flag_for_investigation, resolved actions

title_removal_algorithm.details: Titles (mr, mrs, dr, etc) correctly removed - 'ALONGE MR OLAKUNLE MOSES' matches 'ALONGE OLAKUNLE MOSES' exactly

partial_match_detection.details: Registered name 'Olakunle Alonge' correctly identified as 67% partial match with document names

severity_calculation.details: Severity correctly set to 'none' when all document names match exactly after normalization

frontend_name_mismatch_warning.details: Warning correctly hidden when has_mismatches=false, API call to /api/employees/{id}/name-mismatches returns 200
